sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115717" key="yila/gnafos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψῑλάγνᾰφος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<sense id="n115717.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ψιλός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0074.tlg005:11:1b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.1b</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carpet-cleaner</tr_> (?), Keil-Premerstein <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Dritter Bericht</tr_> No.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0074.tlg005:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
